feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change log for reservation under lineitem
entry.content:
IN ME22N Tcode(PO Change) We have Environment tab we found header changes and item changes.
Same, we need to implement in the MB22 Tcode. There is an environment tab, but there is no scope to view the header and item changes. so we need to incorporate the header and item changes regarding reservations.In report level also like MB25 , There is no scope to view the change log regarding reservation.In table level(RESB) we found header changes.So need to incorporate the change log regarding reservation.For example, in reservation we have 4 line items, the first lineitem ''X'' user deleted and the next line item ''Y' user changed the quantity here We need to view the changes like Which user changed the data. (Either X Or Y).

entry.title: FIORI app F2705 - how to add custom start conditions
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

Good day!

Can you please kindly help me how to create new options in the flag thar correspond to CL20N in APP F2705 in FIORI? 

 





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: OAAQ highest physical year need to reduce from 2026 to 2025
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We posted document number 3000000011 using transaction AFABN in 2024, but the relevant period is now closed. Currently, we have identified an issue with a missing profit center in this document. To resolve this, we need to reverse the document and repost it with the correct profit center assignment.

Could you please suggest the correction?

entry.title: SAP report for Field status comparison between ECC and S4 Hana for vendor accounts
entry.content:
SAP report for Field status comparison between ECC and S4 Hana for vendor accounts.
ECC- Vendor 
S4 Hana- Vendor/BP

entry.title: API to S4 Tables to Azure
entry.content: Need guidance on how to configure a connection from Azure Cloud to SAP S4 tables for extraction of transactional data from ACDOCA

entry.title: S4 FBWE Download Path not clear / no documentation
entry.content:
Hello,

after upgrading to S4 HANA the download path in FDTA cannot be change in S4.

In ERP its not a problem at all.

Pls. see attachment

Regards

entry.title: mb5b and MB5w data miss match in TSP
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

WE are extracting the data using MB5B and MB5W with inputs as company code T101 to T501. 

but the close value of MB5B and total value of MB5w is not matching. 

Can you please guide what are the possiblity that these 2 standard report aren't matching

 

regards

entry.title: After deleting tiles catalog and group, and subsequently performing role synchronization in PFCG
entry.content:
We have removed the tile FS00 from the custom Fiori catalog  ZF_FI_D_FINANCIAL_MANAGER_TRV. After deleting the tile from the catalog (and associated group)

However, when we perform role synchronization in PFCG, we observe that multiple application names are proposed again for addition in the role, including applications related to the previously deleted tile. Along with these newly added application entries

We request clarification on whether this behavior is standard by design in SAP Fiori Launchpad and guidance on the correct

entry.title: Manage Batches Fiori APP F2462 not support for digital signature
entry.content: Manage Batches Fiori APP F2462 not support for digital signature , as same support to Change batch app.

entry.title: The line item violates the cutoff value of -12.40 in area 01 Message No. AA632
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Getting below error while settling WBS DR901-000002-11 in CJ88 

The line item violates the cut off value of -12.40 in area 01

Message No. AA632

PL. see the attachment and suggest the solution as our connection is already opened..

Regards,

Dr. Dharmveer Vishwakarma

Cell-9903327581

entry.title: SAP Readiness Check for Upgrade froto 2025m SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud to 2025
entry.content:
I am working on reviewing the ATC Custom Code Analysis from our Upgrade Readiness report and trying to understand what the items are in the $TMP package under the 'Prerequisites for the test' custom code topic.  Can you advise if these items were created during go-live?  This will be our 1st upgrade since go-live in 2024.  I have read through the documentation but still don't have good clarity to be able to identify the amount of effort that is needed to resolve these issues (or are they actual issues). 

Examples of objects - /GY/20180432121444016800

entry.title: Remove Objects in ATC scans
entry.content:
We want to exclude objects during normal ATC scans. Although a BAdI supports this, it works only during release. As a result, we face challenges when changing the CD status in CHARM, as this re‑initiates the ATC scan and reports messages for the skipped objects.

Example : BRF+ generated function module (Z*) but does not follow naming convention for program variables and signature.  So exemption needs tobe requested for them everytime.

entry.title: System is not allowing us to post the Unplanned Depreciation.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When we are posting the Unplanned Depreciation through T-Code- ABAA, System is giving us the Error message and not allowing us to post the Depreciation. Screenshot is attached in the File.

entry.title: System is not allowing us to post the Unplanned Depreciation.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When we are posting the Unplanned Depreciation through T-Code- ABAA, System is giving us the Error message and not allowing us to post the Depreciation. Screenshot is attached in the File.

entry.title: Unable to post transaction through post capitalization
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,Business requirement as per below.

  1. Need to create asset with post capitalization
  2. Capitalization date is 23.03.2026
  3. Asset put to used date is in previous fiscal year.

But we are getting error while creating asset & posting of asset please refer attached document for referaance.

entry.title: Advanced Returns - Query in 1Z3 (Direct Shipment to Supplier) process
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for looking into this case.

We have a query in process 1Z3 - Direct Shipment to Supplier.

As per the process, below are the steps:

  1. Create returns order
  2. Create returns purchase order (automatically)
  3. Perform logistical return of products from customer directly to supplier
  4. Perform logistical goods receipt at supplier side
  5. Receive credit memo (seller) from supplier
  6. Issue credit memo or replacement (seller) to customer

From above steps, we want to know if we have any way to automate the Credit Memo Request creation after step 5 (Receive credit memo (seller) from supplier) from Return order.

Thank you,

Srujana.

entry.title: Need Odata API to convert Purchase Req to PO
entry.content:
Currently, we are using MD04 to convert Purchase requisition into Purchase order as in screenshot below.

 

 

 

Steps to create PO from MD04 :

1. Open MD04

  • Transaction: MD04
  • Enter:
    • Material
    • Plant
  • Click Enter

2. Select PR line in MD04

 

  •   System navigates dynamically to ME21N
  •   Complete PO details
  •   Save

 

We need :

  1. Odata API to convert Purchase Req to PO
  2. We checked using API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV by giving reference of Purchase Req and Item but it did not work.
  3. If we don't have API , is there any other way to convert Purchase requisition into Purchase order

entry.title: Condition type ZINS in PO 4500021298 give negative values
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are passing ZINS condition type in header with 0.048% but PO line item showing negative values error. Please check attached screenshot.

entry.title: FIORI for DP90 (contract billing) in S/4 HANA service
entry.content:
Will FIORI like DP90 selection screen available in S/4 PERSON_NAME service to do the billing based on contract sales order?

If not then will there be any SAP FIORI app available in S/4 PERSON_NAME service that can provide an option to input contract sales order number on selection screen to  fetch the cost of all associated service order(linked to contract sales order)?

  


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EXCEPTION SEGMENT UNKNOWN RAISED error while calling RFC IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE in Biztalk Middlewar
entry.content:
Hello Mates,

Good Day!

Currently we are facing issue when importing the extended idocs from SAP S4 to biztalk with IDOC segment release 701. We tried changing the WE20 outbound partner profiles parameter idoc release to 701 and also in T-code WE82 but no luck. All segments are in released stated and unlocked and also verified AUTH Issue.

I highly doubt the feasibility and compatability if SAP S4 actually accepts 701 release or not?!!!

Flow:

SAP S4 (idoc extension with 701 release)  -> MS Biztalk -> EDI Partners

Error:

Error while retrieving or generating the WSDL. Adapter message: Details: ErrorCode=RFC_EXCEPTION. ErrorGroup=RFC_ERROR_APPLICATION_EXCEPTION. SapErrorMessage=EXCEPTION SEGMENT_UNKNOWN RAISED.  AdapterErrorMessage=Error returned by RfcCallReceiveEx while calling RFC: IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE..

 

Screenshot:

Thanks and Regards,

Rajesh PS
